blended.narrative: Mount Washington is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,671 ft. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 4" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
